title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash, a multimodal AI model that handles vision, video analysis, contract review, code generation, and agentic workflows. The video demonstrates eight real-world applications including recipe generation from photos, Python chart generation, contract analysis with thinking toggles, React app coding from sketches, voice memo task parsing, error debugging, receipt OCR to JSON, and Workspace automation chains.
